explanations.23: This exports a function that Docusaurus will call to set up the plugin; the function returns an object describing what the plugin does.
explanations.26: The contentLoaded method is a lifecycle hook that Docusaurus calls after all content is loaded, and it gives you the actions object to register new routes.
explanations.27: actions.addRoute() tells Docusaurus to create a new URL pattern; the :slug part is a placeholder that captures whatever series name the user visits.
